example_en: With encouragement from her coach, Amy kept trying and finally won.
example_zh: 在教練的鼓勵下，艾咪不斷嘗試，終於獲勝了。

example_en: The soup was so spicy that I needed a glass of water.
example_zh: 這碗湯太辣了，我需要喝杯水。

example_en: No one wanted to walk past the old haunted house at night.
example_zh: 晚上沒有人想走過那間鬧鬼的老房子。

example_en: Every camper must bring a raincoat for the outdoor activities.
example_zh: 每位營隊學員都必須帶雨衣參加戶外活動。

example_en: A flock of birds flew overhead as we walked along the beach.
example_zh: 我們沿著海灘走時，一群鳥從頭頂上方飛過。

example_en: A light drizzle fell all afternoon, so the streets stayed wet.
example_zh: 整個下午都下著毛毛雨，街道一直濕濕的。

example_en: Workers built a strong pier to hold up the middle of the bridge.
example_zh: 工人建造了堅固的橋墩來支撐橋的中段。

example_en: The old library has stood in this town for over a decade.
example_zh: 這座老圖書館已經在這個小鎮矗立超過十年了。

example_en: Please hold the railing tightly when you walk down these stairs.
example_zh: 走下這些樓梯時請緊緊抓住欄杆。

example_en: The cat jumped onto the table and knocked over a cup.
example_zh: 貓跳到桌子上，把一個杯子撞倒了。

example_en: Tom looked uninterested and kept checking his phone during the movie.
example_zh: 湯姆看起來很不感興趣，看電影時一直在滑手機。

example_en: We need to replace this broken chair before the guests arrive.
example_zh: 我們需要在客人來之前換掉這張壞掉的椅子。

example_en: Each tiny coral polyp builds a hard skeleton around its soft body.
example_zh: 每隻微小的珊瑚蟲都會在牠柔軟的身體外建造堅硬的骨骼。

example_en: The path became stony and rough as we climbed higher up the hill.
example_zh: 我們爬到山丘更高處時，小徑變得多石又崎嶇。

example_en: A massive crowd gathered outside the stadium before the final game.
example_zh: 決賽開始前，一大群龐大的人潮聚集在體育場外。

example_en: Colorful fish swam quickly around the reef near the shore.
example_zh: 色彩繽紛的魚在岸邊的珊瑚礁附近快速游動。

example_en: Small fish often hide in the coral to escape hungry predators.
example_zh: 小魚常常躲在珊瑚裡，以躲避飢餓的掠食者。

example_en: Green algae covered the surface of the quiet pond after the rain.
example_zh: 雨後，綠色藻類覆蓋了這片安靜池塘的水面。

example_en: Divers were amazed by the bright coral under the clear water.
example_zh: 潛水員對清澈水底下鮮豔的珊瑚感到驚嘆。

example_en: Please pack the fragile glasses carefully so they will not break.
example_zh: 請小心包裝這些易碎的玻璃杯，以免破掉。

example_en: Every teammate must arrive early for practice before the big match.
example_zh: 每位隊友在大賽前的練習都必須提早到場。

example_en: Most teens in this class enjoy playing games after finishing homework.
example_zh: 這個班上大多數青少年做完功課後喜歡玩遊戲。

example_en: Eating fast food every day is an unhealthy habit for growing kids.
example_zh: 每天吃速食對正在成長的孩子來說是不健康的習慣。

example_en: She likes to scroll through photos on her phone before going to sleep.
example_zh: 她喜歡睡前滑手機瀏覽照片。

example_en: Good teamwork helped the class finish the science project on time.
example_zh: 良好的團隊合作幫助這個班準時完成科展作品。

example_en: For many students, the benefits of reading outweigh the time it takes.
example_zh: 對許多學生來說，閱讀的好處比花費的時間更重要。

example_en: He felt a wave of frustration when his computer crashed again.
example_zh: 電腦又當機時，他感到一陣挫折。

example_en: This new game is so addictive that players forget to eat dinner.
example_zh: 這款新遊戲太令人上癮了，玩家常常忘記吃晚餐。

example_en: A sudden rainstorm forced everyone to run inside the nearest shop.
example_zh: 一場突然的暴風雨讓每個人都跑進最近的商店裡躲避。
